title: Include Comments Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that controls whether inline code comments are retained or stripped when a machine processes source code. Affects both analysis accuracy and token budget.

## When to use
Enable when comments contain intent, documentation, or context that the model should consider. Disable to reduce token usage or to focus processing on executable code only.

## Notes
See also [Include Tests Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:include-tests-flag;textable) for controlling test file inclusion and [Remove Boilerplate](https://capdag.com/browse/media:remove-boilerplate;textable) for stripping standard boilerplate patterns.
